info.description: Simple bookstore backend built with Go, Gin, GORM and PostgreSQL.
info.title: Bookstore API

get.description: Returns paginated orders for the admin
Returns a single order for the admin

patch.description: Updates the status of an order

post.description: Logout user and invalidate refresh token
Generate a new access token using a refresh token

get.description: Returns a paginated list of books sorted by lowest price first
Returns a single book by its ID

delete.description: Soft deletes a book. Admin only.

get.description: Returns paginated orders of the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new order for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns a single order belonging to the authenticated user

delete.description: Soft deletes the authenticated user account after verifying password. User must not have active orders (pending, confirmed, out_for_delivery).

400.description: Invalid request / wrong password / active orders exist
